meta.purpose: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for omni scoping. Every Beeper thread -> scope, mode, surface, playbook. The ONE-BRAIN router (single consumer of omni.event) reads this and dispatches by scopeID. One Xen, one context, all surfaces simultaneously, idempotent, never double. No per-thread standing agents -> context is fetched fresh from this registry + thread history each dispatch, so scope/history is never 'forgotten'.

scope_types.conversational: Client/human thread. mode active = HOTL auto-reply per playbook; muted = log only. @xen joins with full context.
scope_types.trigger-channel: Sole-member channel = AUTOMATIC WORKFLOW EXECUTION LAYER. ANY inbound instantly fires the channel's workflow per its description. mode is permanently auto. No human on the other side.
scope_types.system: Xen's own lines / self-echoes. Internal, never client-facing.
scope_types.personal: qi's personal contacts. Default muted until @xen. Being consolidated onto 9983 (see gvoice-9983-consolidation).
scope_types.group-monitor: Multi-party group. Monitor + surface; @xen to engage; never blanket auto-reply.
scope_types.service-bot: Bot / shortcode / automation endpoint. Tool-route or ignore; never converse.
scope_types.unscoped: Long-tail. Logged + autoscoped on next activity; default muted.
scope_types.fulfillment: A deliverable owed/owned (live site or in-flight build). dueClient=true => active client currently due to deliver results. Source: hitthe.link/sites.json, regenerated each ship.

autoscope_rules.if: title or participant matches a known scope contact (LaTina/Andre/Luckie/Anthony/M_B numbers)
autoscope_rules.then: attach to that scopeID, mode inherits scope

autoscope_rules.if: surface=telegram AND title ends with '- L7X' AND single-member (only info-xlrd)
who in {xen, CTO EAST, 9934, 8672, Hittl.ink, Synq, Grok line}
single chat with a person, surface in {gmessages,gvoice,whatsapp,imessage,instagram,facebook}
sender is a bot/shortcode (Slackbot, Asana bot, Meta AI, 5-6 digit codes, Telegram service bots)

autoscope_rules.default: type=unscoped, mode=muted, logged - re-evaluated on next inbound
